---
title: "Research Notes"
description: "Short research-note topics for the Shixiong Hu academic website."
---

::: {.eyebrow}
Research Notes
:::

# A publishing lane for short, useful pieces.

::: {.notes-grid}
::: {.note-card}
**Methods note**

### How to compare K-Pg carbon records with CESM soot and charcoal deposition
:::

::: {.note-card}
**Paper explainer**

### Why small impact-site soot burdens can still generate severe global darkness
:::

::: {.note-card}
**Workflow**

### Impact-soot injections could potentially lead to Global Food Crisis
:::
:::
